materialChanges: Framed the cumulative inquiry chain in scenes 1 and 4 as a project-local course navigation aid rather than a universal scientific-method definition, while preserving its retrieval function.
Mapped claim-cross-sectional-use to scene-worked-choice and added that claim to the scene's learner-visible source note.
Changed the practice-table heading from 'What comes next?' to the timing-neutral 'Time logic or next step'.

Reset all seven claim reviewStatus values from reviewed to pending-review so they agree with the draft lesson and pending-review source confidence until the maintainer's authorized publication transition.
Updated the pack disclosure and attribution to identify this fresh 0.1.1 finalization run, instruction digest, candidate, and bounded revision.

reviewDispositions.rationale: claim-cross-sectional-use now includes scene-worked-choice, and the scene 2 source note names the claim while already listing both of its supporting sources.

Both retrieval passages now explicitly identify the chain as this course's navigation aid, explain its slots as project-local memory links, and state that it is not a universal ordering rule; this adopts the review's non-claim-mapping resolution without presenting the chain as a general scientific definition.

All seven claims now use reviewStatus pending-review, consistent with lesson status draft and sourceConfidence pending-review. Promotion remains reserved to the maintainer's authorized post-adjudication publication transition.

The final revision preserves the academically sound distinctions among researcher assignment, cohort direction, outcome-first case-control selection, simultaneous cross-sectional measurement, and defensible outside assignment, with causal language kept conditional.

The four answer keys, 12-point total, rubric criteria, retrospective-cohort versus case-control distinction, cutoff checks, bounded inference, and observational fallback remain unchanged and internally consistent.
The third practice-table column is now headed 'Time logic or next step', which accommodates simultaneous cross-sectional measurement without implying that one measured variable comes next.
The concrete residence-hall opening and its explanation of why design changes the meaning of a comparison remain intact and continue to orient the declared learner before technical vocabulary.
The complete fictional archive example still states the task, givens, constraints, selected model, plan, execution, alternative checks, bounded interpretation, and self-explanation prompt.
Both misconception blocks retain commit, neutral shortcut, failure explanation, repaired model, and changed-case recheck in source order.

evidenceChecked: All four scenes begin with exactly one level-one heading, retain logical source and manifest order, use only ordinary Markdown and approved directives, and explain each table or arrow relationship in nearby prose.

Every learner task has a prose, bullet, or table route; prompts precede feedback; assessment is untimed and retakeable; no outcome depends on color, image, audio, dragging, speed, laboratory access, or personal data.

All seven material claims resolve to valid scene and source IDs and appear in same-scene learner-visible source notes containing every supporting source ID; the scene 2 cross-sectional mapping is complete after revision.

All four reference records identify exact sources, factual-reference use, facts-only original-expression rights bases and evidence, dated checked-no-agent-restriction-found access states, and HTTPS source and terms routes.

The NCBI website and data usage policy was reopened on 2026-07-21; it requires respect for publisher copyright and low-volume scripting limits and showed no agent-specific prohibition for this access.

The lesson and attribution declare CC BY 4.0, original synthesis, no quotation or adaptation, no third-party assets or datasets, the accountable principal, prior material agent runs, and this fresh finalizer run and instruction digest.

Security and privacy inspection found only inert pack-local Markdown and JSON, fictional people and organizations, no raw HTML, JavaScript, remote embed, executable content, unsafe URL, secret, patient record, or identifiable learner data.

Targeted local integrity checks parsed every JSON artifact and confirmed lesson identity and version, scene-minute totals, objective and assessment links, rubric point totals, glossary links, claim/source/note reciprocity, review identity, and distinct declared review runs and providers.
limitations: Per operator instruction, this run did not read the site schemas and did not run npm source preflight, repository validation, rendering, or browser tests; schema conformance is based on the published template shape, the prior same-pack artifact shape, JSON parsing, and targeted local invariants.

No live screen-reader, keyboard-only rendered interface, 200% zoom/reflow, reduced-motion, or manual assistive-technology user test was performed; the content-level audit inspected canonical semantic source and equivalent routes.

Direct PMC article pages returned reCAPTCHA during this audit, so exact article locators and displayed licences were not reprocessed. The finalizer checked the complete reference and rights records, facts-only use declarations, original lesson expression, and the current NCBI policy, but source-specific rights and access remain disclosed attestations rather than warranties.

The operator supplied GitHub COMMENTED transport IDs 4748824930 and 4748825069 for pull request 43 and stated they are author transport rather than dismissal. This run did not independently query GitHub transport state because authenticated GitHub access was unavailable.

No real learner-performance evidence exists, and the review and agent provenance fields are disclosed and attested rather than platform-verified. The Google learning-design artifact declares no conflict although its accountable principal matches the lesson author's principal; founding-stage single-operator use is permitted, but this declaration was not independently verified.
The final content commit does not yet exist, and the operator must replace PENDING-FINAL-COMMIT plus the four RUNTIME-STAMPED provenance fields before committing the adjudication.

rationale: The exact 0.1.1 candidate is a standard lesson under standard-lesson-v3. REV-PREM-SCI-004-ACADEMIC-9CB247CF and REV-PREM-SCI-004-LD-ADD7E357 both target candidate 98d9269eebf04c20e0efe08e4fa91b422316ac85, use distinct declared OpenAI and Google providers and run IDs, supply the required academic and learning-design roles, and return approve verdicts. On the operator-supplied evidence, their PR 43 COMMENTED transports are acceptable author transports; live GitHub state was not independently queried. The two retained 0.1.0 reviews target version 0.1.0 and candidate 4ea0aa83dafaef750aad3c513ff48041d2043e4f, so they are excluded. The portable review-input snapshot therefore has two inputs, two approvals, zero change requests, one disclosed principal, two runs, and two model families; this is an internally checked, attested governance record rather than proof of independent reviewers. The academic review raised three minor findings, all incorporated, and two notes requiring no change. The learning-design review raised one minor finding, incorporated, and three notes requiring no change. The one coherent revision repairs claim-state and claim-scene consistency, removes the cross-sectional timing ambiguity, and bounds the prerequisite chain as a project-local mnemonic while preserving the successful study-design explanation, worked example, practice, misconception repair, transfer, assessment, and recovery routes. The finalizer's targeted academic, answer-logic, accessibility, rights, privacy, security, and provenance checks found no unresolved content blocker. Subject to replacing the pending commit and runtime stamps and completing the maintainer-only publication transition, merge is warranted without another review loop.
conditions: Before committing this adjudication, the operator must replace finalCommit with the exact 40-character SHA of the single final content revision and replace each RUNTIME-STAMPED adjudicator field from the runtime banner.

After the final content and adjudication commits, the maintainer may promote only lesson status, lesson sourceConfidence, and retained claims' reviewStatus fields for publication; no further teaching-content change is covered by this adjudication.
